meta.title: Using BOMs to Threat Model A System
meta.description: Tony Turner describes how you can use various Bills of Materials (BOMs) to create a threat model for a system. He uses the CycloneDX Object Model throughout the session. SaaSBOM's are the most useful BOM for threat model generation, but HBOM, SBOM, Logic BOM (and the coming ML BOM) also can play a role. Tony introduces the concept of BOM-Link to consider these BOMs as a whole.
